productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex Yellow Dial Analog Watch
description: Style Note Check out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Now let your little one flaunt his/her timely bling with panache.   Product Details Case style: Blue and yellow plastic rectangular case  Dial style: White dial with blue and red hands and cartoon print on the dial Strap style: Yellow plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the dial at the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistant Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 15 mm  Case thickness: 7 mm
